creator: dhagan@acm.vt.edu
text:
The builtin(1) manpage includes a table of commands, whether they are 
available as external programs, and whether they are builtin in csh & sh.
The page indicates that 'if' is not a builtin in /bin/sh.

Since it is, as far as I know, a builtin, the page should be fixed at some 
point.

Fix: 

Change the No to Yes in the sh column.
How-To-Repeat: 
man builtin
